---
title: "Sebastián Ayala Ruano"
subtitle: "Bioinformatics | Data Science | Machine Learning | Network Science | Open Science |"
image: images/sayalaruano3.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 600px
  links:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/sayalaruano
      - icon: linkedin
        href: https://linkedin.com/in/sayalaruano
      - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
        href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9756-6745
      - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
        href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbDzPWMAAAAJ
      - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}}"
        href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sebastian-Ayala-Ruano
---

I’m a researcher and freelance data scientist with a background in **bioinformatics** and **cheminformatics**. Over the last six years, my work has taken me to labs in Ecuador, South Korea, the Netherlands, and Denmark. My current research interests are focused on **network science**, **deep learning**, and **software development** to study complex biological systems. I’m also a big believer in **open science** and spend a lot of my time hanging out with communities like [The Turing Way](https://book.the-turing-way.org/), [Open Life Science](https://openlifesci.org/), [Streamlit Creators](https://streamlit.io/creators), and [ISCBSC](https://iscbsc.org/).

When I am not coding, I am almost definitely outdoors. I am really into **hiking, mountaineering, and bouldering**. I also spend a lot of time on two wheels, either riding my mountain bike or planning the next **bikepacking** trip. I also enjoy traveling and discovering new music, movies, and books. 

If you want the full story, check out my [**About** page →](about.qmd)
